faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination in White Plains typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why are rats common in White Plains buildings?
faqs.answer: White Plains has numerous older commercial and residential buildings, particularly in the downtown area, with structural gaps and outdated infrastructure. The city's restaurant scene, Metro-North stations, and connection to the Bronx River Parkway provide food sources and travel corridors that attract rats year-round.
